content: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image.py). Will only touch the save() method area. Let me know what you're working on / if you also touch Image.py.

Your 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' insertion point is still there, just inside the 'elif open_fp:' branch now instead of 'if open_fp:'. Should be no conflict - just make sure your backup logic goes inside that elif branch after that line.
